game.tic_tac_toe.controls: [↑]/[↓]/[←]/[→] Move Cursor [Space]/[Enter] Place Mark [X] Switch Mark Type [R] Restart [Q]/[ESC] Exit
game.tic_tac_toe.description: Place X and O marks, be the first to get three in a row.
game.tic_tac_toe.details:
f%Classic Tic-Tac-Toe game.

{tc:yellow}Items:{tc:clear}
{tc:red}><{tc:clear} X
{tc:light_cyan}(){tc:clear} O

{tc:yellow}Controls:{tc:clear}
{tc:light_cyan}[↑]/[↓]/[←]/[→]{tc:clear} Move cursor
{tc:light_cyan}[Space]/[Enter]{tc:clear} Place mark
{tc:light_cyan}[X]{tc:clear} Switch mark type
{tc:light_cyan}[R]{tc:clear} Restart
{tc:light_cyan}[Q]/[ESC]{tc:clear} Exit
game.tic_tac_toe.name: Tic Tac Toe
